title: StewDrinkSound
description: Stews now make drinking sounds instead of eating sounds!
body: ![Stew Drink Sound Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50760e74ae080a4eea4d8ac680fe12958ec68563.png) --- [](https://discord.gg/tqn38v6w7k) Stew Drink Sound is a lightweight mod that replaces the default eating sound for stews with the potion drinking sound. After all, everyone knows you don’t chew soup. ## Check out my other mods [](https://modrinth.com/mod/adaptivehud) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/anti-item-break)
